headline: Your Artificial Intelligence (AI) Portfolio Probably Looks Very Different Than It Did 6 Months Ago. Here's Why That's OK.

headline: As Meta Doubles Down on Data Center Investment, AMD and American Tower Could Be the Top Stocks to Buy
summary: A durable wave of hyperscale data center buildout should keep high‑end GPUs like AMD’s Instinct line and dense interconnection platforms such as American Tower’s CoreSite campuses in high demand.

headline: Cathie Wood Going Cold On Big Tech? Ark Sells Nvidia, AMD, Meta And Google Stock — AI Darlings Get The Dump
summary: On Thursday, Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest executed significant trades, focusing on reducing holdings in major tech companies. Among the prominent trades were the sales of shares in Meta Platforms Inc., NVIDIA Corp, Advanced Micro Devices Inc., Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd, Broadcom Inc., Alphabet Inc., and Netflix Inc.. These trades reflect a strategic shift in Ark’s investment approach amid market fluctuations. The Meta Platforms Trade Ark Invest made a notable move by selling shares
